AI optical sorting equipment

Turn waste streams into high-value resources.

FDL SORT designs AI-powered optical sorting systems for plastic bottles, films, textiles and mixed municipal recyclables — built for clean, efficient and scalable recycling operations.

Explore machines → Choose your market
Multimodal AI Recognition RGB, NIR & hyperspectral fusion to precisely identify color, material, texture & contaminants.
Vision Algorithm Matrix Object detection & image segmentation synergy for stable, high-precision sorting in complex scenarios.
High-Speed Conveying & Ejection High-speed conveying with millisecond air valves for high throughput & precise sorting.
Intelligent Control Power Data training, flow control & AI linkage supporting 24/7 continuous operation & flexible scaling.

Target regions

Built for real recycling markets.

One equipment platform, different go-to-market stories: community recycling in Southeast Asia, high-throughput automation in North America, and high-purity circular economy requirements in Europe.

Compact deployment for local recycling stations, plastic bottle recovery, mixed packaging and film-heavy material streams.

Technology & AI

Recognition, decision and ejection in one platform.

Make the technology understandable for purchasing teams, plant managers and investors — not just engineers.

AI

AI Vision Models

Trained on real-world waste scenarios to recognize shape, color, texture, stains, labels and deformation.

NIR

Material-Level Sensing

Hyperspectral/NIR options identify plastics by material signature beyond visible appearance.

AIR

Precision Ejection

Millisecond-response pneumatic ejection separates target materials while maintaining throughput.

IO

Connected Operation

Digital monitoring, recipe management and upgrade-ready controls support long-term line performance.

How it works

A simple path from sample test to production line.

The buying journey is designed for B2B decision makers who need proof, layout support and reliable service before purchase.

Material test

Send sample materials or visit a demo line to verify purity targets, throughput and separation logic.

Solution design

Define feed size, belt width, sensor package, reject path and installation footprint.

Installation & training

On-site commissioning, recipe setup, operator training and safety procedures for daily operation.

Service & upgrades

Remote support, spare parts planning, AI model updates and long-term optimization.

Service support

Designed for uptime, not just purchase.

After-sales content should be visible on the independent site because B2B equipment buyers care about installation risk, parts supply and training just as much as price.

Test Center & Engineering

Prove the result before the order: sample testing, process simulation, line layout and customized configuration proposal.

✓Material sample sorting test
✓Line capacity and footprint assessment
✓Sorting recipe and sensor configuration

Connected Service Pack

Keep the line stable with commissioning, operator training, remote diagnostics, spare parts and periodic system updates.

✓Remote diagnostics and performance review
✓On-site installation and maintenance training
✓Upgrade-ready software and AI models
